title: Raise module and updated Referral Program coming within 6 to 8 weeks
content_html:
The Raise module and the updated Referral Program are on the way, with a launch window of 6 to 8 weeks. The Portfolio module follows closely behind.

What this means in practice:

  • Raise gives investment groups and projects a one-click way to launch and manage fundraising pools
  • The updated Referral Program adds clearer revenue share and a smoother onboarding flow
  • Portfolio brings investment tracking, vesting schedules and historical performance into one place

The final launch date will be confirmed in the coming weeks as testing wraps up.
author: Cryptool
